---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to request.

## Problem It Solves
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like in as much detail as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Provide one or more use cases that demonstrate why this feature would be valuable:
- As a [user type], I want to [do something] so that [desired outcome]
- As a [user type], I want to [do something] so that [desired outcome]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
